requirement_topic.en: PSQCA Conformity Marking — PS Mark / Import Conformity for Listed Products
requirement_topic.zh: PSQCA合格标识——列入清单产品的PS标志/进口合格证明
requirement_topic.zht: PSQCA合格標識——列入清單產品的PS標誌/進口合格證明

summary.en: The Pakistan Standards and Quality Control Authority (PSQCA) operates mandatory conformity assessment and marking for items placed on its Conformity Assessment list under the PSQCA Act, 1996. Where household refrigerators fall within a notified mandatory category, conformity to the applicable Pakistan Standard (which adopts IEC 60335-2-24 for safety, and CISPR 14 for EMC where adopted) must be demonstrated and the goods must carry the PS Mark / hold an import conformity certificate before they can be cleared and sold. Unlike the EU's single CE self-declaration, PSQCA marking is a regulator-administered conformity route: it typically involves submission of the product, test reports, and documentation to PSQCA (or its recognised process) for the relevant PS standard. There is no single horizontal multi-directive mark; PSQCA marking covers the standards on its list, while energy efficiency (NEECA) and any radio module (PTA) are handled separately.
summary.zh: 巴基斯坦标准与质量控制局（PSQCA）依据1996年PSQCA法案，对列入其合格评定清单的产品实施强制性合格评定和标识。若家用电冰箱属于已公布的强制类别，须证明符合适用的巴基斯坦标准（安全采用IEC 60335-2-24，已采标时EMC采用CISPR 14），且货物在清关和销售前须带有PS标志/持有进口合格证书。与欧盟单一CE自我声明不同，PSQCA标识是由监管机构管理的合格评定路径：通常涉及向PSQCA（或其认可流程）提交产品、检测报告及相关PS标准的文件。不存在单一的横向多指令标识；PSQCA标识涵盖其清单上的标准，而能效（NEECA）和任何无线模块（PTA）则分别处理。
summary.zht: 巴基斯坦標準與質量控制局（PSQCA）依據1996年PSQCA法案，對列入其合格評定清單的產品實施強制性合格評定和標識。若家用電冰箱屬於已公布的強制類別，須證明符合適用的巴基斯坦標準（安全採用IEC 60335-2-24，已採標時EMC採用CISPR 14），且貨物在清關和銷售前須帶有PS標誌/持有進口合格證書。與歐盟單一CE自我聲明不同，PSQCA標識是由監管機構管理的合格評定路徑：通常涉及向PSQCA（或其認可流程）提交產品、檢測報告及相關PS標準的文件。不存在單一的橫向多指令標識；PSQCA標識涵蓋其清單上的標準，而能效（NEECA）和任何無線模組（PTA）則分別處理。

standards_or_laws: PSQCA Act, 1996 — mandatory standards, Conformity Assessment list, and PS marking scheme
PS Mark / Import Conformity Certificate — required for listed products before customs release
Pakistan Standard adopting IEC 60335-2-24 (safety) and CISPR 14 (EMC, where adopted) — technical basis for refrigerator conformity

summary.en: In China, household refrigerators require China Compulsory Certification (CCC) covering both safety (GB 4706.13) and EMC (GB 4343.1) before sale. CCC is a mandatory third-party certification administered by CNCA-designated certification bodies (CABs) — a regulator-administered route similar in nature to PSQCA marking. Energy labelling (China Energy Label based on GB 12021.2) is a separate mandatory requirement under NDRC/SAMR. There is no single CE-equivalent mark in China; CCC covers safety/EMC and the China Energy Label covers energy. While the CCC route is conceptually comparable to PSQCA's marking route, a Chinese CCC certificate is issued against Chinese GB standards and Chinese certification bodies, and is not automatically accepted by PSQCA as proof of conformity to the Pakistan Standard.
summary.zh: 在中国，家用电冰箱在销售前须取得中国强制认证（CCC），涵盖安全（GB 4706.13）和电磁兼容（GB 4343.1）。CCC为强制性第三方认证，由CNCA指定认证机构（CAB）审核——其性质类似于PSQCA标识的监管管理路径。能效标识（基于GB 12021.2的中国能效标识）是NDRC/SAMR下的独立强制要求。中国没有单一等同CE的标识；CCC涵盖安全/电磁兼容，中国能效标识涵盖能效。虽然CCC路径在概念上与PSQCA标识路径相当，但中国CCC证书是依据中国GB标准及中国认证机构出具的，不被PSQCA自动接受为符合巴基斯坦标准的证明。
summary.zht: 在中國，家用電冰箱在銷售前須取得中國強制認證（CCC），涵蓋安全（GB 4706.13）和電磁相容（GB 4343.1）。CCC為強制性第三方認證，由CNCA指定認證機構（CAB）審核——其性質類似於PSQCA標識的監管管理路徑。能效標識（基於GB 12021.2的中國能效標識）是NDRC/SAMR下的獨立強制要求。中國沒有單一等同CE的標識；CCC涵蓋安全/電磁相容，中國能效標識涵蓋能效。雖然CCC路徑在概念上與PSQCA標識路徑相當，但中國CCC證書是依據中國GB標準及中國認證機構出具的，不被PSQCA自動接受為符合巴基斯坦標準的證明。

standards_or_laws: CCC (China Compulsory Certification) — safety (GB 4706.13) + EMC (GB 4343.1); mandatory; administered by CNCA/SAMR
China Energy Label — Measures for the Administration of Energy Efficiency Labels (NDRC/SAMR); based on GB 12021.2-2015

gap.en: Chinese manufacturers must obtain Pakistan-side conformity, not rely on CCC: (1) PSQCA marking — where refrigerators are on PSQCA's Conformity Assessment list, the exporter (through its Pakistan importer) must demonstrate conformity to the relevant PS standard and obtain the PS Mark / import conformity certificate before customs release; CCC does not substitute. (2) Test-report re-use — PSQCA may accept ILAC MRA / IECEE CB test reports covering the relevant IEC 60335-2-24 (and CISPR 14) clauses, potentially reducing testing — confirm acceptance, sampling, and any national-deviation checks with PSQCA. (3) Documentation — typical package: product technical file, test reports against the adopted PS/IEC standard, invoice/packing details, and importer information; markings (rating plate at 230 V / 50 Hz, model identifier) must align. (4) Coordination — because PSQCA marking and clearance run through the Pakistan importer of record, the exporter cannot self-certify or self-clear (see row frigpk-market-002).
gap.zh: 中国制造商须取得巴基斯坦方合格证明，不能依赖CCC：（1）PSQCA标识——若电冰箱列入PSQCA合格评定清单，出口商（通过其巴基斯坦进口商）须证明符合相关PS标准并在清关前取得PS标志/进口合格证书；CCC不能替代。（2）检测报告复用——PSQCA可能接受涵盖相关IEC 60335-2-24（及CISPR 14）条款的ILAC MRA / IECEE CB检测报告，从而可能减少检测——请向PSQCA确认接受度、抽样及任何国家偏差核查。（3）文件——典型资料包：产品技术文件、依据所采用PS/IEC标准的检测报告、发票/装箱明细及进口商信息；标识（230 V / 50 Hz铭牌、型号标识符）须一致。（4）协调——由于PSQCA标识和清关须通过巴基斯坦进口记录人办理，出口商不能自我认证或自行清关（见frigpk-market-002行）。
gap.zht: 中國製造商須取得巴基斯坦方合格證明，不能依賴CCC：（1）PSQCA標識——若電冰箱列入PSQCA合格評定清單，出口商（通過其巴基斯坦進口商）須證明符合相關PS標準並在清關前取得PS標誌/進口合格證書；CCC不能替代。（2）檢測報告複用——PSQCA可能接受涵蓋相關IEC 60335-2-24（及CISPR 14）條款的ILAC MRA / IECEE CB檢測報告，從而可能減少檢測——請向PSQCA確認接受度、抽樣及任何國家偏差核查。（3）文件——典型資料包：產品技術文件、依據所採用PS/IEC標準的檢測報告、發票/裝箱明細及進口商資訊；標識（230 V / 50 Hz銘牌、型號識別符）須一致。（4）協調——由於PSQCA標識和清關須通過巴基斯坦進口記錄人辦理，出口商不能自我認證或自行清關（見frigpk-market-002行）。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where listed — PSQCA conformity assessment and PS Mark / import conformity certificate required for refrigerators on the Conformity Assessment list before customs release; administered by PSQCA under the PSQCA Act, 1996
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC certification (safety + EMC) required before sale in China; administered by CNCA/SAMR

source.publisher: Pakistan Standards and Quality Control Authority (PSQCA)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Where refrigerators are on PSQCA's Conformity Assessment list, PSQCA marking (PS Mark / import conformity certificate) against the adopted PS/IEC 60335-2-24 standard is mandatory before customs release. Chinese CCC is a separate system and does not substitute. ILAC MRA / IECEE CB reports may reduce testing — confirm acceptance with PSQCA. PSQCA covers safety/EMC standards only; energy (NEECA) and any radio module (PTA) are handled separately.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 若电冰箱列入PSQCA合格评定清单，须在清关前依据所采用的PS/IEC 60335-2-24标准取得PSQCA标识（PS标志/进口合格证书）。中国CCC为独立制度，不能替代。ILAC MRA / IECEE CB报告或可减少检测——请向PSQCA确认接受度。PSQCA仅涵盖安全/电磁兼容标准；能效（NEECA）和任何无线模块（PTA）分别处理。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 若電冰箱列入PSQCA合格評定清單，須在清關前依據所採用的PS/IEC 60335-2-24標準取得PSQCA標識（PS標誌/進口合格證書）。中國CCC為獨立制度，不能替代。ILAC MRA / IECEE CB報告或可減少檢測——請向PSQCA確認接受度。PSQCA僅涵蓋安全/電磁相容標準；能效（NEECA）和任何無線模組（PTA）分別處理。

requirement_topic.en: In-Country Importer of Record — Customs Clearance at Karachi / Port Qasim
requirement_topic.zh: 在地进口记录人——卡拉奇/卡西姆港海关清关
requirement_topic.zht: 在地進口記錄人——卡拉奇/卡西姆港海關清關

summary.en: Goods entering Pakistan must be imported by a locally established importer of record who handles PSQCA conformity clearance and Pakistan Customs (FBR) procedures. For household refrigerators, the bulk of sea-freight enters through Karachi Port and Port Qasim, the country's two principal commercial ports. The importer is responsible for: presenting the PSQCA conformity documentation / PS Mark evidence for listed products; filing the Goods Declaration with Pakistan Customs (WeBOC / PSW system) and paying applicable customs duty, sales tax, and any regulatory duty; arranging the NEECA energy-label compliance at point of sale; and, for connected models, ensuring the radio module holds PTA type-approval. A Chinese exporter cannot self-clear goods into Pakistan — an in-country importer (or local entity / agent) is required as the responsible party for customs and conformity.
summary.zh: 进入巴基斯坦的货物须由在当地设立的进口记录人办理进口，由其处理PSQCA合格清关及巴基斯坦海关（FBR）手续。家用电冰箱的海运货物主要经卡拉奇港和卡西姆港（巴基斯坦两大主要商业港口）入境。进口商负责：为列入清单的产品出示PSQCA合格文件/PS标志证据；向巴基斯坦海关（WeBOC / PSW系统）申报货物报关单并缴纳适用关税、销售税及任何监管税；安排销售点的NEECA能效标签合规；对于联网型号，确保无线模块持有PTA型号核准。中国出口商不能自行将货物清关进入巴基斯坦——须有在地进口商（或当地实体/代理）作为海关和合格责任方。
summary.zht: 進入巴基斯坦的貨物須由在當地設立的進口記錄人辦理進口，由其處理PSQCA合格清關及巴基斯坦海關（FBR）手續。家用電冰箱的海運貨物主要經卡拉奇港和卡西姆港（巴基斯坦兩大主要商業港口）入境。進口商負責：為列入清單的產品出示PSQCA合格文件/PS標誌證據；向巴基斯坦海關（WeBOC / PSW系統）申報貨物報關單並繳納適用關稅、銷售稅及任何監管稅；安排銷售點的NEECA能效標籤合規；對於聯網型號，確保無線模組持有PTA型號核准。中國出口商不能自行將貨物清關進入巴基斯坦——須有在地進口商（或當地實體/代理）作為海關和合格責任方。

standards_or_laws: Customs Act, 1969 — Pakistan import clearance and Goods Declaration framework (administered by FBR / Pakistan Customs)
WeBOC / Pakistan Single Window (PSW) — electronic import declaration and clearance system
Principal entry ports: Karachi Port and Port Qasim
PSQCA Act, 1996 — conformity documentation presented by the importer for listed products

summary.en: China has no regulatory requirement that obliges an export manufacturer to appoint a foreign-country resident responsible operator. Chinese exporters typically work with overseas distributors, trading companies, or buyers on a commercial basis. Under China's domestic regime, the CCC certificate holder is the party responsible for domestic-market compliance — a role limited to China and not extending to Pakistan customs or PSQCA conformity. There is therefore no Chinese statutory analogue to Pakistan's requirement for an in-country importer of record who carries customs and conformity responsibility at the port of entry.
summary.zh: 中国没有要求出口制造商指定一名在目的国境内居住的责任运营商的监管规定。中国出口商通常以商业形式与海外经销商、贸易公司或买方合作。在中国国内制度下，CCC证书持有人为国内市场合规的责任方——该角色仅限于中国，不延伸至巴基斯坦海关或PSQCA合格。因此中国没有与巴基斯坦关于在入境口岸承担海关和合格责任的在地进口记录人的要求相对应的法定规定。
summary.zht: 中國沒有要求出口製造商指定一名在目的國境內居住的責任運營商的監管規定。中國出口商通常以商業形式與海外經銷商、貿易公司或買方合作。在中國國內制度下，CCC證書持有人為國內市場合規的責任方——該角色僅限於中國，不延伸至巴基斯坦海關或PSQCA合格。因此中國沒有與巴基斯坦「在入境口岸承擔海關和合格責任的在地進口記錄人」要求相對應的法定規定。

standards_or_laws: N/A — no direct Chinese regulatory equivalent obliging appointment of a foreign importer of record

gap.en: This is a structural gap with no Chinese regulatory analogue. A Chinese refrigerator manufacturer must work through a Pakistan importer of record (a locally established company or appointed agent) who: (1) is the declarant on the Pakistan Customs Goods Declaration (WeBOC/PSW) at Karachi or Port Qasim and pays duties/taxes; (2) presents PSQCA conformity evidence (PS Mark / import conformity certificate) for listed products at clearance; (3) handles NEECA energy-label application at point of sale; and (4) for connected models, ensures the radio module's PTA type-approval is in place. The exporter should agree contractually which party owns each compliance task (PSQCA marking, test-report procurement, NEECA label, PTA approval) and ensure rating plates and documentation match Pakistan requirements (230 V / 50 Hz, model identifier, importer details). Without an in-country importer, the goods cannot be cleared regardless of product conformity.
gap.zh: 这是一个在中国监管体系中没有类似规定的结构性差距。中国电冰箱制造商须通过巴基斯坦进口记录人（当地设立的公司或委任代理）运作，该方：（1）在卡拉奇或卡西姆港作为巴基斯坦海关货物报关单（WeBOC/PSW）的申报人并缴纳关税/税费；（2）在清关时为列入清单的产品出示PSQCA合格证据（PS标志/进口合格证书）；（3）办理销售点的NEECA能效标签；（4）对于联网型号，确保无线模块的PTA型号核准到位。出口商应以合同约定各项合规任务（PSQCA标识、检测报告获取、NEECA标签、PTA核准）由哪一方负责，并确保铭牌和文件符合巴基斯坦要求（230 V / 50 Hz、型号标识符、进口商信息）。若无在地进口商，无论产品是否合格，货物均无法清关。
gap.zht: 這是一個在中國監管體系中沒有類似規定的結構性差距。中國電冰箱製造商須通過巴基斯坦進口記錄人（當地設立的公司或委任代理）運作，該方：（1）在卡拉奇或卡西姆港作為巴基斯坦海關貨物報關單（WeBOC/PSW）的申報人並繳納關稅/稅費；（2）在清關時為列入清單的產品出示PSQCA合格證據（PS標誌/進口合格證書）；（3）辦理銷售點的NEECA能效標籤；（4）對於聯網型號，確保無線模組的PTA型號核准到位。出口商應以合同約定各項合規任務（PSQCA標識、檢測報告獲取、NEECA標籤、PTA核准）由哪一方負責，並確保銘牌和文件符合巴基斯坦要求（230 V / 50 Hz、型號識別符、進口商資訊）。若無在地進口商，無論產品是否合格，貨物均無法清關。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — an in-country importer of record is required to file the Pakistan Customs Goods Declaration and present conformity documentation at Karachi / Port Qasim; a foreign exporter cannot self-clear
mandatory_status.cn: No equivalent requirement — Chinese export manufacturers have no statutory obligation to appoint a foreign importer of record under Chinese law

source.publisher: Federal Board of Revenue (FBR) / Pakistan Customs

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A Chinese refrigerator exporter must work through a Pakistan in-country importer of record who files the Customs Goods Declaration at Karachi / Port Qasim, presents PSQCA conformity evidence for listed products, arranges the NEECA label, and ensures PTA approval for any radio module. There is no Chinese equivalent obligation, and the exporter cannot self-clear — agree contractually which party owns each compliance task before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国电冰箱出口商须通过巴基斯坦在地进口记录人运作，由其在卡拉奇/卡西姆港申报海关货物报关单、为列入清单的产品出示PSQCA合格证据、办理NEECA标签，并确保任何无线模块的PTA核准。中国无对应义务，且出口商不能自行清关——出货前应以合同约定各项合规任务的责任方。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國電冰箱出口商須通過巴基斯坦在地進口記錄人運作，由其在卡拉奇/卡西姆港申報海關貨物報關單、為列入清單的產品出示PSQCA合格證據、辦理NEECA標籤，並確保任何無線模組的PTA核准。中國無對應義務，且出口商不能自行清關——出貨前應以合同約定各項合規任務的責任方。
